# hs-opentelemetry-vendor-honeycomb

Optional Honeycomb-specific integration for hs-opentelemetry.

> **Note:** Honeycomb natively supports OTLP. For most use cases, just use
> [hs-opentelemetry-exporter-otlp](https://github.com/iand675/hs-opentelemetry/tree/main/exporters/otlp):

```
OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=https://api.honeycomb.io
OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS=x-honeycomb-team=YOUR_API_KEY
```

Part of [hs-opentelemetry](https://github.com/iand675/hs-opentelemetry).
